texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sulzer Chemtech established the new business unit Process Technology in Allschwil by combining its proven process solution capabilities for distillation, membrane separation and crystallization with the activities of the recently acquired company Kühni Ltd, Allschwil, Switzerland.
texts.text: Sulzer Chemtech established the new business unit Process Technology in Allschwil by combining its proven process solution capabilities for distillation, membrane separation and crystallization with the activities of the recently acquired company Kühni Ltd, Allschwil, Switzerland.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: As  an  expert  in  thermal,  diffusional  and  membrane  separation  technology for the separation and purification of aqueous and organic mixtures, Process Technology provides process engineering services and designs, manufactures and supplies process equipment, as well as turn-key modular plants to the process industry, with a focus on the pharmaceutical and fine chemical industry.
texts.text: As  an  expert  in  thermal,  diffusional  and  membrane  separation  technology for the separation and purification of aqueous and organic mixtures, Process Technology provides process engineering services and designs, manufactures and supplies process equipment, as well as turn-key modular plants to the process industry, with a focus on the pharmaceutical and fine chemical industry.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The main fields of activities comprise
texts.text: The main fields of activities comprise

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Engineering  services  such  as  conceptual  process  design,  feasibility studies, plant optimizations including process validation in the test center
texts.text: Engineering  services  such  as  conceptual  process  design,  feasibility studies, plant optimizations including process validation in the test center

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Testing  including  process  development,  feasibility  and  scale-up  in  a well equipped, state-of-the-art test center
texts.text: Testing  including  process  development,  feasibility  and  scale-up  in  a well equipped, state-of-the-art test center

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Complete separation process plants, in particular modular plants (skids)
texts.text: Complete separation process plants, in particular modular plants (skids)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: From first concept to guaranteed plant performance
texts.text: From first concept to guaranteed plant performance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Membrane processes are common place in industrial applications; they replace evaporation and distillation at improved economics.
texts.text: Membrane processes are common place in industrial applications; they replace evaporation and distillation at improved economics.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Novel  hybrid  separation  concepts with unique overall  performance characteristics are possible by combining membranes with thermal and/or  extractive  separation  technologies.  Process  Technology  is able to engineer and supply hybrid systems as one coherent unit using its expertise in both membrane and thermal separation technologies.
texts.text: Novel  hybrid  separation  concepts with unique overall  performance characteristics are possible by combining membranes with thermal and/or  extractive  separation  technologies.  Process  Technology  is able to engineer and supply hybrid systems as one coherent unit using its expertise in both membrane and thermal separation technologies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We offer the following membrane technologies:
texts.text: We offer the following membrane technologies:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Hybrid System: Distillation - Reverse Osmosis - Evaporation
texts.text: Hybrid System: Distillation - Reverse Osmosis - Evaporation

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Key application areas in organic systems:
texts.text: Key application areas in organic systems:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Dehydration of organic solvents like alcohols, ketones, esters, ethers, etc.
texts.text: Dehydration of organic solvents like alcohols, ketones, esters, ethers, etc.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Separation of higher molecular weight components from organic solvents
texts.text: Separation of higher molecular weight components from organic solvents

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pervaporation is a thermal membrane separation process to remove water or methanol from organic solvents. Volatile fluids can be continuously treated - the permeate passes selectively through the membranes and is continuously removed under vacuum.
texts.text: Pervaporation is a thermal membrane separation process to remove water or methanol from organic solvents. Volatile fluids can be continuously treated - the permeate passes selectively through the membranes and is continuously removed under vacuum.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This process requires neither a regeneration step nor the introduction of an additional fluid. Therefore, further separation steps and potential environmental impacts are avoided.
texts.text: This process requires neither a regeneration step nor the introduction of an additional fluid. Therefore, further separation steps and potential environmental impacts are avoided.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Process Technology has a proprietary range of PERVAP™ polymer composite membranes. A cooperation with Mitsui Engineering and Shipbuilding Ltd., Japan, enables us to also offer world class inorganic pervaporation membranes. This flexibility allows the implementation of the most suitable membrane type for the economic and reliable operation of your process.
texts.text: Process Technology has a proprietary range of PERVAP™ polymer composite membranes. A cooperation with Mitsui Engineering and Shipbuilding Ltd., Japan, enables us to also offer world class inorganic pervaporation membranes. This flexibility allows the implementation of the most suitable membrane type for the economic and reliable operation of your process.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These membranes use an active polyvinyl alcohol separating layer, differently cross-linked to adapt the membrane separation performance.
texts.text: These membranes use an active polyvinyl alcohol separating layer, differently cross-linked to adapt the membrane separation performance.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Process intensification Separation of methanol from methyl acetate
texts.text: Process intensification Separation of methanol from methyl acetate

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The world's first vapor permeation unit for this  application  was  installed  in  2000,  where  it  replaces an  extractive  distillation  step  with water as solvent.
texts.text: The world's first vapor permeation unit for this  application  was  installed  in  2000,  where  it  replaces an  extractive  distillation  step  with water as solvent.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dehydration of ethanol used as fuel, or as solvent in the pharmaceutical industry,  is  the  largest  application for  pervaporation  and  vapor  permeation.
texts.text: Dehydration of ethanol used as fuel, or as solvent in the pharmaceutical industry,  is  the  largest  application for  pervaporation  and  vapor  permeation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Process  optimisation  is  done  according  to  local  requirements  and the available utilities.
texts.text: Process  optimisation  is  done  according  to  local  requirements  and the available utilities.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We also make use of our long term experience with heat integrated distillation equipment.
texts.text: We also make use of our long term experience with heat integrated distillation equipment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Solvents in the pharmaceutical, fine chemical, and other processes are routinely treated by pervaporation: alcohols,  ethers,  esters  and  ketones as well as mixtures thereof.
texts.text: Solvents in the pharmaceutical, fine chemical, and other processes are routinely treated by pervaporation: alcohols,  ethers,  esters  and  ketones as well as mixtures thereof.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Combined  or  hybrid  solutions  improve  the  competiveness  of  our pervaporation processes against classic  routes  in  terms  of  economics and yield.
texts.text: Combined  or  hybrid  solutions  improve  the  competiveness  of  our pervaporation processes against classic  routes  in  terms  of  economics and yield.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  No introduction of additional components - complete water/ methanol removal irrespective of azeotrope formation
texts.text: No introduction of additional components - complete water/ methanol removal irrespective of azeotrope formation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Flexible processes - the systems can be designed to treat a variety of solvent mixtures
texts.text: Flexible processes - the systems can be designed to treat a variety of solvent mixtures

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  The choice of continuous or batch pervaporation or vapor permeation depending on the duty
texts.text: The choice of continuous or batch pervaporation or vapor permeation depending on the duty

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Vapor permeation processes combined with distillation as effective hybrids to reduce capital and operational costs
texts.text: Vapor permeation processes combined with distillation as effective hybrids to reduce capital and operational costs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -  Skid assembled standardised units for fast delivery and installation in minimum hook-up time
texts.text: Skid assembled standardised units for fast delivery and installation in minimum hook-up time

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Process  Technology  is  the  expert  in  thermal  and  extractive  separation technologies, and includes pressure driven membrane technologies, for the treatment of both organic solvents and water based liquids, in its core industries.
texts.text: Process  Technology  is  the  expert  in  thermal  and  extractive  separation technologies, and includes pressure driven membrane technologies, for the treatment of both organic solvents and water based liquids, in its core industries.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The combination of these technologies to hybrid processes with evaporation  or  extraction  is  especially  attractive  because  of  substantial  energy savings, lower investment and smaller footprints.
texts.text: The combination of these technologies to hybrid processes with evaporation  or  extraction  is  especially  attractive  because  of  substantial  energy savings, lower investment and smaller footprints.

texts.orig: -  Recovery of homogeneous and heterogeneous catalysts

texts.text: Clarification and concentration of organic and mineral acids

texts.text: Removal of unwanted components in solution or suspension

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In order to be able to supply the most appropriate membrane and module configuration required by the different applications, Process Technology cooperates closely with major reliable membrane producers worldwide.
texts.text: In order to be able to supply the most appropriate membrane and module configuration required by the different applications, Process Technology cooperates closely with major reliable membrane producers worldwide.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For the separation of mixtures a range of different membrane processes can be employed. Proper membrane selection is important since it impacts the cost of the installation, the plant performance and the membrane lifetime. Testing is required to identify the potential of a membrane process and to select the most appropriate membrane. Depending on the separation task further tests in different scales might be performed to guarantee a reliable scale-up.
texts.text: For the separation of mixtures a range of different membrane processes can be employed. Proper membrane selection is important since it impacts the cost of the installation, the plant performance and the membrane lifetime. Testing is required to identify the potential of a membrane process and to select the most appropriate membrane. Depending on the separation task further tests in different scales might be performed to guarantee a reliable scale-up.

table_cells.text: A strongly crosslinked membrane used primarily for dehydration of reaction mixtures, up to 80% water
A standard membrane, suitable for most dehydration applications
The first high flux PERVAP™ membrane, developed for the dehydration of alcohols, esters and ethers
The high flux membrane especially tailored for the dehydration of C 3 and higher alcohols
The first methanol selective membrane to remove methanol from less polar organics
A membrane with tailored separation properties, suit- able for simultaneous removal of water and methanol
An organophilic membrane to remove VOCs and aroma from aqueous solutions
